title: 3-arm match on (websocket_capability, supports_chat_websocket): INFO/WARN/DEBUG distinction correct and worth defending
description: The match clearly documents three server configurations: no WS at all (INFO — expected for non-WebSocket servers), partial capability (WARN — suggests misconfiguration), full support (DEBUG — normal path). A contributor might collapse WARN to INFO thinking it is cleaner. Do not: the WARN is intentional because partial capability indicates a server that understands the WebSocket extension but hasn't enabled the chat part — operationally actionable.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change needed
